sanskrit: अहं वैश्वानरो भूत्वा प्राणिनां देहमाश्रितः । प्राणापानसमायुक्तः पचाम्यन्नं चतुर्विधम् ॥
hindiTranslation: प्राणियोंके शरीरमें रहनेवाला मैं प्राणअपानसे युक्त वैश्वानर होकर चार प्रकारके अन्नको पचाता हूँ ॥
englishTranslation: I become the digestive fire within living beings, joined with the outgoing and incoming breaths, and digest the four kinds of food.
essence: The divine is already working inside your body as life itself.
speaker: Krishna
